name: Russell Ford
title: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
description: Leads the overall strategic direction and operations of StandardAero as the top executive and board chairman.

name: Daniel Satterfield
title: Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees all financial operations, reporting, and strategy for the company.

name: Ross Dowd
title: Chief Operating Officer
description: Responsible for the day-to-day operational execution across StandardAero's business segments.

name: Jennifer Rapp
title: Chief Human Resources Officer
description: Leads human resources strategy, talent management, and organizational development.

name: Ramy Sherif
title: Chief Information Officer
description: Oversees information technology infrastructure, digital transformation, and IT strategy.

name: James Doyle
title: Chief Legal Officer and Secretary
description: Manages all legal affairs, compliance, and corporate governance matters for the company.
